mapper.select: select user_id, avatar_url, nickname, gender, grade, college, major, interest_tags, bio, real_name, verified, verify_status from user_profile where user_id = #{userId} limit 1

select conversation_id, starter_user_id, target_user_id, source_type, source_id, source_title, last_message, last_message_type, last_message_at, created_at, updated_at from chat_conversation where conversation_id = #{conversationId} limit 1

select conversation_id from chat_conversation where least(starter_user_id, target_user_id) = least(#{userA}, #{userB}) and greatest(starter_user_id, target_user_id) = greatest(#{userA}, #{userB}) order by conversation_id desc limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into chat_conversation (starter_user_id, target_user_id, source_type, source_id, source_title, last_message, last_message_type, last_message_at) values (#{starterUserId}, #{targetUserId}, #{sourceType}, #{sourceId}, #{sourceTitle}, '', 'text', now())
insert into chat_conversation_member (conversation_id, user_id, archived, unread_count, last_read_at) values (#{conversationId}, #{userId}, 0, 0, now())

insert into chat_conversation_member (conversation_id, user_id, archived, unread_count, last_read_at) values (#{conversationId}, #{userId}, 0, 0, now()) on duplicate key update archived = 0, updated_at = now()
mapper.select: select c.conversation_id as id, case when c.starter_user_id = #{userId} then c.target_user_id else c.starter_user_id end as peer_user_id, p.nickname as name, p.avatar_url as avatar_url, left(p.nickname, 1) as avatar_text, coalesce(nullif(c.source_type, ''), '校园伙伴') as badge, c.last_message as preview, date_format(c.last_message_at, '%H:%i') as time, m.unread_count as unread, m.archived as archived, p.gender, null as age, coalesce(p.college, '校园') as school, p.grade, p.major, date_format(c.created_at, '%Y年%c月%e日') as match_date, c.source_title as source, p.interest_tags as common_tags_text from chat_conversation_member m join chat_conversation c on c.conversation_id = m.conversation_id join user_profile p on p.user_id = case when c.starter_user_id = #{userId} then c.target_user_id else c.starter_user_id end where m.user_id = #{userId} and m.archived = #{archived} order by c.last_message_at desc, c.conversation_id desc

select message_id, conversation_id, sender_user_id, receiver_user_id, message_type, content, attachment_url, attachment_name, latitude, longitude, send_status, created_at from chat_message where conversation_id = #{conversationId} order by message_id
mapper.insert: insert into chat_message (conversation_id, sender_user_id, receiver_user_id, message_type, content, attachment_url, attachment_name, latitude, longitude, send_status) values (#{conversationId}, #{senderUserId}, #{receiverUserId}, #{messageType}, #{content}, #{attachmentUrl}, #{attachmentName}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{sendStatus})
mapper.update: update chat_conversation set last_message = #{content}, last_message_type = #{messageType}, last_message_at = #{createdAt}, updated_at = now() where conversation_id = #{conversationId}
